completion_criteria_checked: The repo gains canonical policy text for an Owner Review Matrix that states, concretely, when PCC must stop and wait for owner review before unattended progress continues.
The matrix covers at least the owner-required cases named in BRR Plan Phase 1.
The policy stays practical rather than abstract, with no runtime gating and no Phase 2 execution logic.
Truth-surface propagation is handled honestly across the named docs.
The owner_decisions curation-policy ambiguity, if touched, is resolved in a small, explicit, non-blocking way.
Claude returns evidence in .cockpit/result/worker-result.md using the required format and flags where independent review is still recommended.
risks: Row 11 of the Owner Review Matrix intentionally depends on pcc-brr1-002 for full task-class operationalization, so that row is bounded correctly but not yet final in isolation.

This is policy content, so correctness is judgment-based rather than deterministically testable; DECISION-022's recommendation for independent secondary review remains appropriate as a standing BRR Phase 1 practice.
Rows 9 and 10 intentionally overlap with the upcoming Stop-Instead-of-Guess Policy; that later task must cross-reference this matrix rather than drift from it.
summary: Reviewed the new BRR policy doc and its propagated truth-surface updates against the task boundaries and completion criteria. The repo now has a concrete canonical Owner Review Matrix in docs/BRR_POLICY.md, all 11 required owner-review cases are covered, the owner_decisions ambiguity is resolved as a small STATE_MODEL clarification, and no runtime or out-of-scope changes were introduced. All completion criteria met.
next_action: Task 'pcc-brr1-001' is complete and verified PASS. Advisor selects and drafts the next bounded BRR Phase 1 task.
